name: 404-to-301
description: Automatically redirect every 404 error to any page using a 301 redirect, log every 404 request, and get email notifications when broken links are hit.

scripts.build: wp-scripts build assets/src/settings.js assets/src/logs.js assets/src/redirects.js assets/src/addons.js --output-path=build
scripts.start: wp-scripts start assets/src/settings.js assets/src/logs.js assets/src/redirects.js assets/src/addons.js --output-path=build
